    1. getTradeValues(double, TermStructureMonteCarloSimulationModel, List, RandomVariable[], RandomVariable[])

Interface ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio.HedgeInstrumentTradeValueProvider

Enclosing class:
ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio
Functional Interface:
This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.
@FunctionalInterface public static interface ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio.HedgeInstrumentTradeValueProvider
Provides adapted trade values used in the self-financing cash-account update.
Author:
Christian Fries

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RandomVariable[]
    getTradeValues(double evaluationTime, TermStructureMonteCarloSimulationModel model, List<TermStructureMonteCarloProduct> hedgeInstruments, RandomVariable[] hedgeInstrumentProtoValues, RandomVariable[] conditioningBasisFunctions)
    Returns adapted trade values of the hedge instruments at evaluationTime.

  • Method Details

    • getTradeValues

      RandomVariable[] getTradeValues(double evaluationTime, TermStructureMonteCarloSimulationModel model, List<TermStructureMonteCarloProduct> hedgeInstruments, RandomVariable[] hedgeInstrumentProtoValues, RandomVariable[] conditioningBasisFunctions) throws CalculationException
      Returns adapted trade values of the hedge instruments at evaluationTime.
      Parameters:
      evaluationTime - The rebalancing time t.
      model - The term-structure Monte-Carlo model.
      hedgeInstruments - The hedge instruments.
      hedgeInstrumentProtoValues - The raw product values returned by getValue(t, model).
      conditioningBasisFunctions - Basis functions used for conditional-expectation projection.
      Returns:
      The adapted trade values used to finance the hedge trades.
      Throws:
      CalculationException - Thrown if a value cannot be obtained.
